shellCommands.command: source /home/user/workspace/vectorops-venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip build pypiserver 2>&1
mkdir -p /tmp/test-vectorops && cd /tmp/test-vectorops && python3 -m venv test-venv && source test-venv/bin/activate && pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 2>&1

source /tmp/test-vectorops/test-venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); print('Test passed! dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]) =', dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])); print('dotproduct([1,2,3], [4,5,6]) =', dotproduct([1,2,3], [4,5,6]))" 2>&1
